description: Official Lados construction operations capability pack for site projects, inspections, defects, site diary, and handover actions.
ownerBoundary: create project or site operation resource
guardrails: Construction Operations nodes capture site records and evidence; QS valuation belongs to QS Commercial.
Defect and inspection outputs must preserve actor, date, location, photos/documents, and source references.
Standards and checklist knowledge belongs in Knowledge Packs.

verification.manifest: verified — S6 fix: nodes.json only defined 5 of the 6 nodes manifest.json declared (run_handover_checklist was missing); added it
verification.runtime: implemented — all 6 nodes implemented. New migration 0059_construction_site_diary_resource_type.sql adds site_diary; construction_project/site_inspection/defect reuse migration 0041. run_handover_checklist is deliberately stateless (no resource persisted) — handover sign-off happens via a separate lados.human.record_decision node in the composing template
